sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and amt1 = 0
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex2 = c.Name from TransX t inner join Companies c on t.Co = c.Co where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex1 = '4 FX Hedge' from TransX inner join MapKeyRanges m1 on GL >= FromGL and GL <= ThruGL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m1.MapKey = 'M3-3-6-06-B-2'
update TransX set Flex1 = '3 Other Expense' from TransX inner join MapKeyRanges m1 on GL >= FromGL and GL <= ThruGL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m1.MapKey = 'M3-3-6-06-C'

update TransX set Flex1 = '2 Capital Gains - FX' from TransX inner join MapKeyRanges m1 on GL >= FromGL and GL <= ThruGL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m1.MapKey = 'M3-3-6-06-B' and TTY >= '990' and Flex1 is NULL
update TransX set Flex1 = '1 Investment Income' from TransX inner join MapKeyRanges m1 on GL >= FromGL and GL <= ThruGL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m1.MapKey = 'M3-3-6-06-A' and TTY >= '990'
update TransX set Flex1 = '1 Investment Income' from TransX inner join MapKeyRanges m1 on GL >= FromGL and GL <= ThruGL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m1.MapKey = 'M3-3-6-06-A-1' and Flex1 is NULL
update TransX set Flex1 = '2 Capital Gains - FX' from TransX inner join MapKeyRanges m1 on GL >= FromGL and GL <= ThruGL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m1.MapKey = 'M3-3-6-06-B-1' and Flex1 is NULL
update TransX set Flex1 = '2 Capital Gains - FX' from TransX inner join MapKeyRanges m1 on GL >= FromGL and GL <= ThruGL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m1.MapKey = 'M3-3-6-06-A-2' and Flex1 is NULL
update TransX set Flex1 = '99 not applicable' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 is  NULL

sqlSelect.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Co, GL, TTY, Amt1) values ('[batchID]','[Yr][Mo]',[Yr],[Mo],
